{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032300484564F8D7173B2BAA59B39A"}"},"total":2373},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7404142082075165502","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"1，三观超正，2，幽默诙谐 ，3故事、人物刻画生动 4，带有悬念引人深思，5超甜的恋爱感 ，所以必须五星好评，作者加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723914699,"group_id":"7363561931698867224","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzyGsfFG/u66C+ea+JExqN4qzTI++RNDkxeAiSJg4KZ8","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2057874653847999","user_name":"实在的北白川馅子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2057874653847999","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7363561931698867224","book_info":{"abstract":"【仙侠+轻松+搞笑+凡人+无厘头】
意外穿越到修仙世界，发现自己竟是宗门内人人厌恶的恶霸，还有个嫖到失联的不正经师父。
本想改过自新，重新做人，奈何人人都想害我，那我只好努努力，成为天下第一啦。
养灵宠，叼烟斗，勾搭仙子有一手。
斩仙神，诛鬼邪，遇到强敌就溜走。
这就是我，修仙界不一样的烟火。
我叫叶风，开枝散叶的叶，风流倜傥的风。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a750191eb4614bb34668bc90a2817a7e","author":"响尾蛇皮袋","author_id":"","book_id":"7363561931698867224","book_name":"修仙反骨仔","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#200800","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"10.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7363563123808141848","read_count":"103648","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3862236"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"1596","tags":"东方仙侠,奇幻仙侠,仙侠,玄幻,架空,搞笑轻松,穿越,反派","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/81136088ed5b7b185c4faeca757ba425~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382125&x-signature=HYmu0Uflfl1YGewm3G8kr3Sta1Q%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3562022976892814","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"441"},"
